description_long: This is a compact, toy water gun styled in the recognizable Nerf Elite series design, featuring a predominantly blue and white body with orange accents. The main body is constructed from molded plastic, with the word 'ELITE' printed in bold blue letters on both sides and the Nerf logo displayed centrally. The handle is ergonomically shaped with a gray and black color scheme, and the trigger is a contrasting orange, positioned for easy access. The front of the water gun has a cylindrical orange nozzle, suggesting a single-stream water output, and the barrel area is partially open, revealing some of the internal mechanism. The water reservoir appears to be integrated into the main body, with no visible detachable tank or fill cap, maintaining a sleek and streamlined silhouette. The overall finish is smooth and glossy, with some minor texturing on the grip and trigger for improved handling.
description: A compact, blue and white Nerf Elite water gun with orange accents, featuring a sleek, integrated design and bold branding. The handle and trigger are ergonomically shaped, and the nozzle is a prominent orange cylinder at the front.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow, cylindrical orange nozzle and the blue top rail, with the handle and trigger barely visible.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the 'ELITE' branding, Nerf logo, orange trigger, and the full profile of the handle and barrel.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the blue back section, the top sight, and the alignment of the handle and trigger.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, with 'ELITE' branding, Nerf logo, and clear visibility of the orange barrel and trigger.
attribute_brand_logo: The Nerf logo is visible in white and blue on both sides of the main body, centrally placed below the barrel. The word 'ELITE' is printed in bold blue letters on both sides of the rear body section.
attribute_trigger_design: The trigger is a standard pull type, colored orange, with a rounded, ergonomic shape and slight texturing for grip. It is positioned within a gray trigger guard below the main body.
attribute_nozzle_type: The nozzle is a single, cylindrical orange piece at the front, designed for a single water stream, with no visible adjustable or multi-stream features.
attribute_water_reservoir_style: The water reservoir is integrated into the main body, with no detachable tank or visible fill cap. It is streamlined and concealed within the blue and white plastic housing.
attribute_grip_pattern: The grip area is gray with a subtle, molded texture for improved handling, featuring shallow grooves and a slight contour. The pattern is visually simple and extends over the lower portion of the handle.
